rationale: Gov't Code §2306.146 governs board authority over interest rates and amortization schedules for housing loans. It does not reference homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no conflict arises.
quote: The board shall have the specific duty and power to establish interest rates and amortization schedules for loans made or financed under this chapter.
_note: No textual or topical nexus between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this housing-finance interest-rate provision.
